hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git commit'; then files=$(git -C /home/user/newtonia diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(cpp|h)$'); if [ -n "$files" ]; then all_errors=''; for f in $files; do out=$(cd /home/user/newtonia && g++ -std=c++11 -fsyntax-only -I. -I/usr/include/SDL2 "$f" 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then real=$(echo "$out" | grep 'error:' | grep -v 'No such file or directory'); if [ -n "$real" ]; then all_errors="$all_errors\n$real"; fi; fi; done; if [ -n "$all_errors" ]; then printf '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "C++ syntax errors — fix before committing:%s"}' "$all_errors"; exit 0; fi; fi; fi
